# Failure Mode Taxonomy

| Failure | Symptom | Likely cause |
|---|---|---|
| delivery failure | no impressions | platform/account/audience issue |
| attention failure | low CTR | weak hook or wrong audience |
| inspection failure | clicks bounce | ad-page mismatch |
| trust failure | high engagement, no signup | weak proof |
| offer failure | interest, no action | bad next step |
| friction failure | form abandon | UX/setup burden |
| activation failure | signup, no value | onboarding/product gap |
| monetization failure | activation, no pay | pricing/value mismatch |
| economics failure | revenue < cost | channel/offer/unit economics |
| measurement failure | data inconsistent | tracking design |
